title: Payment of License Fee. After compliance with all the requirements and
content: 23 the application for Provisional License has been approved by the Department, a license 24 fee in the amount of Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (PhP200,000.00) shall be paid before 25 the license is released. 26 27
